prose: The HOMO–LUMO gap of furan was computed via DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (density-fit, tier 'standard'), using PySCF, in the gas phase. The calculation was carried out at charge 0 and multiplicity 1, with the SCF converged after 9 cycles. The HOMO–LUMO gap is 6.2573602 eV. Geometry provenance: the input structure, provided as `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz`, was not optimized further at this level (single-point calculation). No warnings were reported. The calculation results have been deemed trustworthy by the integrity checks. The detailed JSON output is available at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpjbftu19m/live.json` for inspection.
